---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What user pain point or missing capability does this solve? Lead with the *problem*, not the solution. Example: *"After logging the same lunch every weekday I have to re-enter every ingredient — there's no way to save a meal as a template."*

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? Walk through the user flow at a high level.

## Alternatives you've considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, even if you ruled them out. This often surfaces a simpler design.

## Mockups or examples

If you have sketches, screenshots from other apps, or written examples, attach them here.

## Scope

Tick what applies:

- [ ] UI-only change (a new screen or a tweak to an existing one)
- [ ] New backend / Firestore schema
- [ ] New device permission required
- [ ] Affects the onboarding flow
- [ ] Affects offline behavior

## Why this matters to you

One or two sentences on how often you'd use this and what currently makes it painful.
